red.details: Added 11 new auto-save test cases + updated 3 existing onClose tests with waitFor

changes: Extracted saveToApi as shared function for both manual and auto-save paths
Removed duplicate setOriginalContent call from saveContent (handled in saveToApi)
Used saveToApi directly in handleAutoSaveToggle to avoid disabled closure issue with saveNow

commits: 732b22d: feat(markdown-editor): add auto-save mode toggle for MarkdownEditor
summary: TDD implementation complete. Added auto-save toggle to MarkdownEditor with useAutoSave hook integration, localStorage persistence, error fallback, beforeunload handling, Ctrl+S branching, async handleClose, and comprehensive test coverage (11 new tests + 3 updated). All 4266 unit tests pass. TypeScript and ESLint: 0 errors.
